testsuite.name: no.nav.pdfgen.HelperTest

testcase.name: Capitilize all should handle multiple space$pdfgen_test()
lt - less than should return false when compared to one self$pdfgen_test()
Datetime formatting should format as Norwegian short date and time$pdfgen_test()
not eq should return false when compared to one self$pdfgen_test()
Currency formatting should format number as currency without decimals$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array a null fish field results in IT_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
breaklines should replace forward slash r n with newline$pdfgen_test()
gt - greater than should fail if comparing two null or empty$pdfgen_test()
lt - less than should fail if argument are not of same type$pdfgen_test()
gt - greater than should fail if argument are not of same type$pdfgen_test()
gt - greater than should return false when compared to one self$pdfgen_test()
Datetime formatting should format as Norwegian short date$pdfgen_test()
uppercase should uppercase strings with numbers$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should not find if at least one did not match$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should do nothing if already capitilized$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array containing the field fish, but its a false boolean should result in NO_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal double to string if string has same content$pdfgen_test()
Any operator should result in a YES when one of multiple statements is ok$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should not find if empty parameter$pdfgen_test()
not eq should return true compared two null or empty$pdfgen_test()
Is defined should output empty string if someOtherProperty is not defined$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal double to string if string has same content - reverse$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize names splitted by apostrophe$pdfgen_test()
gt - greater than should return false when first param less than second param$pdfgen_test()
lt - less than should return false when first param greater than second param$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize all when mixed lower then upper$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should find single param that matches$pdfgen_test()
Is defined should output IS DEFINED if someProperty is defined$pdfgen_test()
Currency formatting should format string to currency$pdfgen_test()
Any operator should result in empty result when many statements fails$pdfgen_test()
not eq should return true if different content$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array containing the field fish should result in the string IT_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
not eq should return true if different values$pdfgen_test()
Currency formatting should format number as currency$pdfgen_test()
Any operator should result in a YES when a single statement is ok$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal int to string if string has same content$pdfgen_test()
Any operator should result in empty result when a single statement fails$pdfgen_test()
gt - greater than should return true when first param greater than second param$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array without the field fish should result in NO_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should not fail if list is empty$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal int to string if string has same content - reverse$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should throw exception if unknown list$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal to content - reverse$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should not equal if not equal$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize all lower$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize all when mixed upper then lower$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should find all values without order$pdfgen_test()
uppercase should uppercase all letters$pdfgen_test()
lt - less than should return true when first param less than second param$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should not equal if null or empty$pdfgen_test()
Datetime formatting should format timestamp as Norwegian long date$pdfgen_test()
breaklines should replace forward slash n with newline$pdfgen_test()
not eq should return true if different content - reverse$pdfgen_test()
Any operator should result in a YES when the first of multiple statements is ok$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize all uppers$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array with two nodes, where the field fish contains null on the first and a normal value on the second results in IT_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
uppercase should uppercase all lower letters$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a array with two nodes, where the second contains the field fish results in IT_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
lt - less than should fail if comparing two null or empty$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should do nothing if already capitilized - single word$pdfgen_test()
Currency formatting should format integer to currency$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize names splitted by dash$pdfgen_test()
Capitilize all should capitalize names splitted by dash with spacec in between$pdfgen_test()
Datetime formatting should format date as Norwegian long date$pdfgen_test()
contains_all should not find if no parameter$pdfgen_test()
eq should equal self should equal to content$pdfgen_test()
List contains helper a empty array should result in NO_CONTAINS$pdfgen_test()
